refnamediv.refpurpose: Creates a new topology schema and registers it in the topology.topology table.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: This is the SQL-MM equivalent of . It lacks options for spatial reference system and tolerance. it returns a text description of the topology creation, instead of the topology id.
&sqlmm_compliant; SQL-MM 3 Topo-Geo and Topo-Net 3: Routine Details: X.3.17

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting: SELECT topology.ST_InitTopoGeo('topo_schema_to_create') AS topocreation; astopocreation ------------------------------------------------------------ Topology-Geometry 'topo_schema_to_create' (id:7) created.
